name: You're the Xenomorph!
description:
**Updated Names for better distinction of the characters.**
You're an "Alien Organism" on board of the commercial vessel "Ferraco" somewhere in the outer rim. Just born, you bursted your way through the chest of the only male crew member. Captain Denver. As you hide to grow, you notice that there are 6 different humans onboard. They aim to kill you. So it's either you or them.
Characters from left to right (Profile Pic): 
- 1st Officer Jodie Desington
- 2nd Officer Nadia Kodan
- Navigator Megan McCarthy
- Science Officer/Ship Doctor Laura Waters
- Chief Engineer Samantha Walsh
- Engineer Amanda Lee
- Captain Charles Denver (Deceased)

I tried something different this time around. This bot is made for Roleplay were you are the monster/villain. Including gore and horror.
creator: RobRoy85
